description: Sector overlay for U.S. mine operators, mineral extraction, processing, mine safety, reclamation, environmental, and federal-land mining documentation.

metadata.scope: United States sector overlay controls for Mining. Intended to be used with us/core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from U.S. federal statutes, regulations, agency guidance, regulator materials, and sector frameworks available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance. State, territorial, tribal, and local obligations may impose additional requirements.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: EPA mining sector and effluent guidelines
Office of Surface Mining Reclamation and Enforcement materials
primary_sources.issuer: U.S. Department of the Interior / OSMRE

primary_sources.name: Bureau of Land Management mining and mineral materials
primary_sources.issuer: U.S. Department of the Interior / BLM

rules.title: MSHA mine registration, operator, or safety evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for MSHA mine ID, operator, safety program, accident reporting, training, or mine safety compliance evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Miner training and hazard communication evidence is documented
rules.summary: Checks for new miner training, annual refresher training, hazard communication, workplace examination, or competent-person evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Mining wastewater, discharge, or environmental controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for NPDES, effluent guidelines, wastewater, tailings, stormwater, reclamation, or environmental monitoring controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: EPA ore mining and dressing effluent guidelines

rules.title: Federal/state mining claim, lease, plan, or reclamation evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for mining claim, plan of operations, lease, surface mining permit, reclamation plan, or bond evidence.
